title: Functions of the Sulfatase-Modifying Factor 1 (HaSumf1) in the development and host glucosinolates adaptation of Helicoverpa armigera
author: Long, Zhang
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-zero
description: In this study, we detailed the indicators of development of  H. armigera , such as growth and development period, number of surviving larvae, body weight, pupa weight, and number, as well as the relative expression levels of  HaSumf1  gene at different instars, and the third- and fifth-instars after feeding with glucosinolates and /or ds Sumf1 .
steps_raw: In this study, we detailed the indicators of development of  H. armigera , such as growth and development period, number of surviving larvae, body weight, pupa weight, and number, as well as the relative expression levels of  HaSumf1  gene at different instars, and the third- and fifth-instars after feeding with glucosinolates and /or ds Sumf1 .
